---
schema: qual/card@1
id: PRP-PIDX
kind: proposition
title: A subgroup of index $p$ in a $p\dash$group is normal
classification:
  areas:
  - algebra
  topics:
  - groups
relations: []
review: draft
---

::: proposition
If $G$ is a finite $p\dash$group and $H \leq G$ has index $p$, then $H \normal G$.
:::
